free_text: Elastic and inelastic deuteron scattering on
C, Mg, Ti, Fe, Ni, Cu and Zn at 11.8 MeV
discriminate deuterons from other reaction products
Accuracy of absolute cross sections is determined
mainly by inhomogeneity of foils and amounted to
VS. SF1 and SF4 corrected in 013 and 015.
